title: OCHA Humanitarian Reference Layer
description: Humanitarian reference layer for Gaza and the surrounding crossings. Demo structure prepared for later OCHA/HDX-based updates.

data_policy.usage_note: This is a humanitarian reference layer, not a tactical or military layer.
data_policy.precision_note: Coordinates are approximate in the demo version and must be replaced by verified OCHA/HDX coordinates before analytical publication.
data_policy.license_note: Before automated use, confirm the specific dataset licence and attribution requirements.

features.name: Erez / Beit Hanoun Crossing
features.summary: Demo humanitarian crossing reference point. Replace with verified OCHA/HDX data before publication.

features.name: Kerem Shalom Crossing
features.summary: Demo humanitarian crossing reference point. Replace with verified OCHA/HDX data before publication.

features.name: Rafah Crossing
features.summary: Demo humanitarian crossing reference point. Replace with verified OCHA/HDX data before publication.

features.name: Gaza City health facility cluster
features.summary: Demo health-facility cluster marker for the Gaza City area. Replace with verified OCHA/WHO/HDX facility data.

features.name: Central Gaza shelter / IDP site reference
features.summary: Demo shelter or IDP-site reference marker. Replace with verified OCHA/HDX site data.

features.name: Al-Mawasi humanitarian area reference
features.summary: Demo humanitarian-area reference marker. Polygon geometry should be added only from verified OCHA/UN sources.

legend.crossing: Humanitarian or border crossing reference point
legend.shelter_idp_site: Shelter or internally displaced persons site
